title: The startup's Postgres survival guide
summary: 这篇指南为初创公司提供PostgreSQL数据库的生存指南，涵盖常见陷阱、性能优化、备份策略和扩展建议，帮助团队避免数据丢失和性能瓶颈。
summary_en: This guide provides a survival guide for startups using PostgreSQL, covering common pitfalls, performance optimization, backup strategies, and scaling advice to help teams avoid data loss and performance bottlenecks.
